requirements: visible PLAYING, WIN, and LOSE states
live input, UI, log, and screenshot verification

toolSelectionFindings.observation: The first call was get_godot_version even though the task did not depend on a version branch.
toolSelectionFindings.suggestedChange: Teach cold-start examples to begin with project inspection or creation unless compatibility is material.

toolSelectionFindings.observation: The agent supplied arrays for Vector2 and Color scene properties. Calls reported success, but a later read showed default positions, sizes, and colors, forcing a repair loop.
toolSelectionFindings.suggestedChange: Add structured-property examples near add_node and modify_scene_node, and reject shapes that cannot convert to the target Variant type.

toolSelectionFindings.observation: The agent called game_key_press with an unsupported pressed=true field. The field was ignored, the successful tap moved for one physics tick, and the agent spent multiple loops diagnosing why the key was not held.
toolSelectionFindings.suggestedChange: Reject unknown input fields, say tap or auto-release in the short description, and make the hold alternative easier to discover.

toolSelectionFindings.observation: The hidden game_key_hold tool exactly matched the need, but the agent never searched godot_tools and instead repeated taps and changed game speed.
toolSelectionFindings.suggestedChange: Strengthen instructions and skills with a search-before-workaround rule when the core surface lacks an expected operation.

toolSelectionFindings.observation: The agent initially hand-composed validate, run, wait, UI, log, screenshot, and stop calls. It used verify_project only for the final gate.
toolSelectionFindings.suggestedChange: Show verify_project as the first static and smoke verification step, while retaining manual calls for interactive win and lose paths.

toolSelectionFindings.observation: read_scene returned a very large default-property dump when the agent needed to inspect only a few authored nodes and properties.
toolSelectionFindings.suggestedChange: Offer concise or node-filtered scene reads and point authoring workflows to them.

toolSelectionFindings.observation: After stopping the game, the agent tried to read a guessed injected runtime file that cleanup had already removed.
toolSelectionFindings.suggestedChange: Keep automatic cleanup prominent and direct debugging toward tool descriptions instead of injected implementation files.
